title: Times smp
description:
Time SMP is a hardcore survival & PvP plugin where time is the player’s life.
Time decreases in real-time, controls health, and powerful time-based weapons let players steal or destroy each other’s time.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_Si3ieU4aU8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Time SMP

Remake Plugin Owner - **architback20**




Time SMP is a survival & PvP plugin where time is your life.

_Players have limited time that decreases every second.
Time directly controls player health, combat, and elimination.
When a player’s time reaches zero, they are removed from the server.
_

The plugin introduces custom time-based weapons, real-time action bar HUDs, crafting recipes, and an admin GUI — making it ideal for hardcore SMPs and competitive PvP servers.

Features

Real-time hour + second life system

Health scales with remaining time

Custom weapons with unique abilities

Action bar cooldown & time display

Admin GUI and time management commands

Fully persistent player data

Weapons

Time Steal Sword – Steals 10 seconds per hit

Time Cage Sword – Traps players in a temporary obsidian cage

Time Mace – Launch attack & anvil rain ability

Nuke Trident – Large area explosion weapon

Time Pause Shard – Temporarily pauses time decay


```
Commands
/timesmp
/timesmp time set <player> <time>
/timesmp time add <player> <time>

Permissions
timesmp.admin
```


Compatibility

Minecraft 1.21+

Paper / Spigot

Java 17+

License-
architback20

Time Smp Owner :-
Creadit - 3point42

**Fan Made Replica Plugin**
